response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed, his recent work at re:cinq and open-source contributions suggest relevant exposure. His leadership in developer tooling and mentorship aligns with the role's technical-leadership requirements, though his cloud and RAG architecture experience is less evident.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and modern AI-agent frameworks (e.g., MCP).
Proven leadership in developer tooling, mentorship, and technical discovery sessions (e.g., workshops, open-source projects).
Strong problem-solving skills across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, and AI infrastructure).
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions or RAG architectures.
Cloud platform experience (AWS/GCP/Azure) is not prominently detailed in the resume.
Lacks mention of vector databases or LLM performance optimization, key preferred qualifications.
